title: Ensure S3 buckets do not allow public access
description:
Amazon S3 buckets can be configured to allow public access. Allowing public access to S3 buckets can expose sensitive data to the internet.

Status: Bucket acme-data-archive has public read access enabled via bucket ACL.

Risk: Public read access to an S3 bucket can allow anyone on the internet to read or download the bucket's contents, potentially exposing sensitive or confidential data.

payload.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access settings on the bucket to prevent public access.
payload.status_extended: Bucket acme-data-archive has public read access enabled via bucket ACL.
payload.risk: Public read access to an S3 bucket can allow anyone on the internet to read or download the bucket's contents, potentially exposing sensitive or confidential data.

raw.CheckTitle: Ensure S3 buckets do not allow public access
raw.StatusExtended: Bucket acme-data-archive has public read access enabled via bucket ACL.
raw.Description: Amazon S3 buckets can be configured to allow public access. Allowing public access to S3 buckets can expose sensitive data to the internet.
raw.Risk: Public read access to an S3 bucket can allow anyone on the internet to read or download the bucket's contents, potentially exposing sensitive or confidential data.

Code.Terraform: resource "aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block" "example" { bucket = "acme-data-archive" block_public_acls = true block_public_policy = true ignore_public_acls = true restrict_public_buckets = true }

Recommendation.Text: Enable S3 Block Public Access settings on the bucket to prevent public access.

Requirements.Description: Ensure S3 bucket policy is set to deny HTTP requests
